Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy describes how Furniva collects, uses, and discloses your personal information.

This Privacy Policy describes how Furniva ("we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, and discloses your personal information when you visit, interact with our services, or make purchases through Furniva.in (the "Site").

Introduction

Welcome to Furniva, a proprietorship based in India specializing in high-quality and affordable home and office furniture. By using or accessing our services, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue using our services.

Information We Collect

1. Information You Provide Directly

  • Contact Information: Name, address, phone number, and email address.
  • Order Details: Shipping and billing information, payment confirmation, and order history.
  • Account Details: Username, password, and security questions for registered users.
  • Customer Support Information: Information provided during inquiries or support requests.

2. Information Collected Automatically

  • Device information, IP address, browser type, and operating system.
  • Browsing behavior, such as pages viewed, items added to cart or wishlist, and referring URLs.

3. Information Obtained from Third Parties — payment processors and shipping providers who help us operate the Site and process transactions.

How We Use Your Information

  • Order Processing and Fulfillment — to process payments, confirm orders, arrange shipping, handle returns, and communicate about your purchases.
  • Customer Service — to respond to inquiries and improve our services based on feedback.
  • Marketing and Promotions — to send promotional emails and offers. You can unsubscribe at any time.
  • Security and Fraud Prevention — to detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and other harmful activities.
  • Analytics — to analyze usage data and improve our Site and services.

Disclosure of Personal Information

We may share your personal information with service providers (payment processors, shipping providers, IT support, analytics), in business transfers (merger, acquisition, or sale), to comply with legal requirements, or with your explicit consent.

Cookies

We use cookies to personalize your experience and gather usage data, including remembering your preferences and maintaining your cart. You may manage cookie settings in your browser, though disabling cookies may impact certain Site features.

Your Rights and Choices

  • Access and Correction — request access to your personal information and correct inaccuracies.
  • Deletion — request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal exceptions.
  • Opt-Out — unsubscribe from marketing emails at any time.
  • Data Portability — request an electronic copy of your personal information.

Data Security and Retention

We implement industry-standard measures to protect your information, though no security measure is completely infallible. We retain personal information as long as necessary to fulfill our services and comply with legal requirements.

Children's Privacy

Our services are not intended for children, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under 16.

Contact Us

Email: support@furniva.in
Phone: +91 8929722253

Effective Date: 12/12/2024
